title: GovernanceCheck
description: An auditable governance check record. Documents that a sovereignty-relevant action was reviewed against applicable rules, permissions, and safety boundaries before execution.

id.description: Unique identifier for this governance check record.

checkType.description: The type of governance check performed.

subject.description: The entity or action being checked.

entityId.description: The identifier of the entity (agent, robot, system) being checked.

action.description: The action or operation that triggered this governance check.

targetResource.description: The resource or entity the action is directed at.

context.description: Additional context relevant to the check.

checkedBy.description: The identifier of the system or entity that performed this check (e.g., a policy engine, a governance agent).

rulesApplied.description: References to the rules, policies, or contracts evaluated during this check.

ruleId.description: Identifier of the rule or policy.

reason.description: Explanation of why this rule passed or failed.

outcome.description: The overall outcome of this governance check.

conditions.description: Conditions attached to a conditional-approval outcome.

escalationTarget.description: If outcome is 'escalated', the identifier of the party the decision is escalated to.

overrideBy.description: If a human or higher authority overrode the check result, their identifier.

overrideReason.description: Reason for the override, if applicable.

timestamp.description: When this governance check was performed.

retentionPeriod.description: How long this governance check record must be retained for audit purposes. ISO 8601 duration.
